name: @ggui-samples/agent-google-adk
description: Brand-agnostic Google ADK (TypeScript) backend. Boots an HTTP API (default port 6792) + sandbox-proxy server (default port 7792). Pure backend — no bundled frontend; pair with @ggui-samples/app-ggui-basic-web (or any MCP-Apps-spec frontend) via VITE_AGENT_ENDPOINT_URL. Real LLM via GEMINI_API_KEY. Not published.
